description: Spawn a SubAgent to perform a deep-dive analysis of the Archon open-source repository (https://github.com/coleam00/Archon) and its documentation (https://archon.diy/book/). Answer the 4 specific questions raised by the user regarding Archon's workflow routing, authoring, and its potential as the ideal baseline for the team-agents-cowork framework.
scope: Analyze Archon's source code and documentation. Focus on its workflow engine (YAML-based DAGs), its 17 default workflows, its workflow router, and its custom authoring capabilities. Evaluate the hypothesis that augmenting Archon with multi-domain/heterogeneous AI support represents the ideal end-state for our framework. Produce a detailed analysis report.
out_of_scope: No modifications to our local codebase. No actual installation or integration of Archon yet.
